package rulecoverage

func PositiveGormModelHookCallsServiceOrRepository() string {
    ruleID := "gorm_model_hook_calls_service_or_repository"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Model hooks that depend on higher-layer services or repositories."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
